---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as documented
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**To reproduce**
Steps, including the exact command or integration snippet:

```
npx ai-command-center ...
```

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- AI Command Center version: (`npx ai-command-center --version`)
- Node version: (`node -v`)
- OS:
- Provider(s) involved: (openai / anthropic / gemini / …)
- Streaming or non-streaming:

**Logs / screenshots**
Gateway terminal output or a dashboard screenshot if relevant. Do **not** paste
your API keys.
